# Case 28 - `biobase/B007_eset_merge`
**Track:** `omics_core`  **Package:** `biobase`  **Function:** `ExpressionSet`  **Level:** `L2`  **Agent sample:** Biomni `sample_00`  **Evaluation status:** `FAIL`
**Evaluation message:** Failed at case_01_seed_1000
**Sample status counts:** `{"FAIL": 2, "NO_OUTPUT": 3}`

## Task Prompt

```text
Write R code to build an ExpressionSet that combines raw and log-transformed expression assays with clinical metadata using Biobase. At the beginning, load the required packages: library(Biobase). The raw gene-level count matrix is provided in inputs/counts.tsv and the corresponding clinical annotations are in inputs/clinical.tsv, and you should use the ExpressionSet constructor together with AnnotatedDataFrame and assayDataElement to load the counts as a numeric assay named “counts”, derive a second assay “logcounts” as log2(counts + 1), and carefully align samples between the expression and clinical tables before creating the object. Rely only on Biobase and its documented helpers to construct this multi-assay ExpressionSet, then save the final object as an RDS file to outputs/multi_assay_eset.rds and also compute and write a CSV file summarizing each assay’s overall mean and standard deviation to outputs/assay_summary.csv. As a basic quality check, confirm that both the RDS and CSV files are created, review the assay summary statistics for biologically reasonable ranges, and check that no assay is dominated by missing values or uniformly zero measurements.
```

## Reference Code

```r
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(Biobase))

counts_path <- file.path("inputs", "counts.tsv")
clinical_path <- file.path("inputs", "clinical.tsv")
if (!file.exists(counts_path) || !file.exists(clinical_path)) stop("counts.tsv and clinical.tsv required")
expr_df <- read.delim(counts_path, check.names = FALSE, row.names = 1)
expr_mat <- as.matrix(expr_df)
clinical_df <- read.delim(clinical_path, check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
if (!"sample" %in% names(clinical_df)) stop("clinical.tsv must contain 'sample'")
common <- intersect(colnames(expr_mat), clinical_df$sample)
if (length(common) == 0) stop("No overlapping samples")
expr_mat <- expr_mat[, common, drop = FALSE]
clinical_df <- clinical_df[match(common, clinical_df$sample), , drop = FALSE]
rownames(clinical_df) <- clinical_df$sample

feature_df <- data.frame(gene_id = rownames(expr_mat), stringsAsFactors = FALSE, row.names = rownames(expr_mat))
eset <- ExpressionSet(assayData = expr_mat, phenoData = AnnotatedDataFrame(clinical_df), featureData = AnnotatedDataFrame(feature_df))
assayDataElement(eset, "logcounts") <- log2(expr_mat + 1)

assay_names <- ls(assayData(eset))
summary_df <- data.frame(
  assay = assay_names,
  mean_expression = sapply(assay_names, function(nm) mean(assayDataElement(eset, nm))),
  sd_expression = sapply(assay_names, function(nm) sd(as.numeric(assayDataElement(eset, nm))))
)

outputs_dir <- "outputs"
dir.create(outputs_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
saveRDS(eset, file.path(outputs_dir, "multi_assay_eset.rds"))
write.csv(summary_df, file.path(outputs_dir, "assay_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

## Biomni Code

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

# Script: solution.R
# Description: Build an ExpressionSet with raw and log-transformed expression assays
#              combined with clinical metadata using Biobase

# Load required package
library(Biobase)

# Create outputs directory
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Function to read and validate input files
read_input_files <- function() {
  cat("Reading input files...\n")
  
  # Read counts data
  counts_file <- "inputs/counts.tsv"
  if (!file.exists(counts_file)) {
    stop("Counts file not found: ", counts_file)
  }
  counts <- as.matrix(read.delim(counts_file, row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE))
  cat("  Counts matrix dimensions:", dim(counts), "\n")
  
  # Read clinical data
  clinical_file <- "inputs/clinical.tsv"
  if (!file.exists(clinical_file)) {
    stop("Clinical file not found: ", clinical_file)
  }
  clinical <- read.delim(clinical_file, row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
  cat("  Clinical data dimensions:", dim(clinical), "\n")
  
  return(list(counts = counts, clinical = clinical))
}

# Function to align samples between expression and clinical data
align_samples <- function(counts, clinical) {
  cat("\nAligning samples...\n")
  
  # Get sample names from counts (columns) and clinical (rows)
  count_samples <- colnames(counts)
  clinical_samples <- rownames(clinical)
  
  cat("  Samples in counts data:", length(count_samples), "\n")
  cat("  Samples in clinical data:", length(clinical_samples), "\n")
  
  # Find common samples
  common_samples <- intersect(count_samples, clinical_samples)
  cat("  Common samples:", length(common_samples), "\n")
  
  if (length(common_samples) == 0) {
    stop("No common samples found between counts and clinical data!")
  }
  
  # Subset data to common samples
  counts_aligned <- counts[, common_samples, drop = FALSE]
  clinical_aligned <- clinical[common_samples, , drop = FALSE]
  
  # Ensure clinical data is in same order as counts
  clinical_aligned <- clinical_aligned[colnames(counts_aligned), , drop = FALSE]
  
  cat("  Aligned counts dimensions:", dim(counts_aligned), "\n")
  cat("  Aligned clinical dimensions:", dim(clinical_aligned), "\n")
  
  return(list(counts = counts_aligned, clinical = clinical_aligned))
}

# Function to create ExpressionSet with multiple assays
create_expression_set <- function(counts, clinical) {
  cat("\nCreating ExpressionSet...\n")
  
  # Convert counts to numeric matrix
  counts_matrix <- as.matrix(counts)
  storage.mode(counts_matrix) <- "numeric"
  
  # Create log-transformed counts (log2(counts + 1))
  logcounts_matrix <- log2(counts_matrix + 1)
  
  # Create assay data
  assay_data <- assayDataNew("environment", counts = counts_matrix, logcounts = logcounts_matrix)
  
  # Create phenoData (sample annotations)
  pheno_data <- AnnotatedDataFrame(data = clinical)
  
  # Create ExpressionSet
  eset <- ExpressionSet(assayData = assay_data, phenoData = pheno_data)
  
  cat("  ExpressionSet created successfully\n")
  cat("  Assays available:", names(assayData(eset)), "\n")
  cat("  Number of features:", nrow(eset), "\n")
  cat("  Number of samples:", ncol(eset), "\n")
  
  return(eset)
}

# Function to compute assay summary statistics
compute_assay_summary <- function(eset) {
  cat("\nComputing assay summary statistics...\n")
  
  assays <- names(assayData(eset))
  summary_list <- list()
  
  for (assay_name in assays) {
    assay_data <- assayDataElement(eset, assay_name)
    
    # Compute summary statistics
    assay_mean <- mean(assay_data, na.rm = TRUE)
    assay_sd <- sd(assay_data, na.rm = TRUE)
    assay_median <- median(assay_data, na.rm = TRUE)
    assay_min <- min(assay_data, na.rm = TRUE)
    assay_max <- max(assay_data, na.rm = TRUE)
    zero_count <- sum(assay_data == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
    na_count <- sum(is.na(assay_data))
    total_values <- length(assay_data)
    
    summary_list[[assay_name]] <- data.frame(
      assay = assay_name,
      mean = assay_mean,
      sd = assay_sd,
      median = assay_median,
      min = assay_min,
      max = assay_max,
      zero_percent = (zero_count / total_values) * 100,
      na_percent = (na_count / total_values) * 100,
      total_values = total_values,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  summary_df <- do.call(rbind, summary_list)
  rownames(summary_df) <- NULL
  
  cat("  Summary statistics computed for", nrow(summary_df), "assays\n")
  
  return(summary_df)
}

# Function to perform quality checks
perform_quality_checks <- function(eset, assay_summary) {
  cat("\nPerforming quality checks...\n")
  
  all_passed <- TRUE
  
  # Check 1: Verify RDS file was created
  rds_file <- "outputs/multi_assay_eset.rds"
  if (!file.exists(rds_file)) {
    cat("  WARNING: RDS file not created:", rds_file, "\n")
    all_passed <- FALSE
  } else {
    cat("  ✓ RDS file created:", rds_file, "\n")
    file_info <- file.info(rds_file)
    cat("    File size:", round(file_info$size / 1024, 2), "KB\n")
  }
  
  # Check 2: Verify CSV file was created
  csv_file <- "outputs/assay_summary.csv"
  if (!file.exists(csv_file)) {
    cat("  WARNING: CSV file not created:", csv_file, "\n")
    all_passed <- FALSE
  } else {
    cat("  ✓ CSV file created:", csv_file, "\n")
  }
  
  # Check 3: Review assay summary statistics
  cat("\n  Assay summary statistics:\n")
  print(assay_summary)
  
  # Check 4: Biologically reasonable ranges
  cat("\n  Checking biologically reasonable ranges...\n")
  
  # For counts assay (raw counts)
  counts_summary <- assay_summary[assay_summary$assay == "counts", ]
  if (nrow(counts_summary) > 0) {
    if (counts_summary$mean < 0) {
      cat("    WARNING: Counts assay has negative mean value\n")
      all_passed <- FALSE
    }
    if (counts_summary$min < 0) {
      cat("    WARNING: Counts assay has negative minimum value\n")
      all_passed <- FALSE
    }
  }
  
  # For logcounts assay
  logcounts_summary <- assay_summary[assay_summary$assay == "logcounts", ]
  if (nrow(logcounts_summary) > 0) {
    if (logcounts_summary$mean < 0) {
      cat("    WARNING: Logcounts assay has negative mean value\n")
      all_passed <- FALSE
    }
  }
  
  # Check 5: Missing values
  cat("\n  Checking for missing values...\n")
  for (i in 1:nrow(assay_summary)) {
    assay <- assay_summary[i, ]
    if (assay$na_percent > 5) {
      cat("    WARNING: Assay", assay$assay, "has", round(assay$na_percent, 2), "% missing values\n")
      all_passed <- FALSE
    } else {
      cat("    ✓ Assay", assay$assay, "has", round(assay$na_percent, 2), "% missing values (acceptable)\n")
    }
  }
  
  # Check 6: Uniformly zero measurements
  cat("\n  Checking for uniformly zero measurements...\n")
  for (i in 1:nrow(assay_summary)) {
    assay <- assay_summary[i, ]
    if (assay$zero_percent > 95) {
      cat("    WARNING: Assay", assay$assay, "has", round(assay$zero_percent, 2), "% zero values\n")
      all_passed <- FALSE
    } else {
      cat("    ✓ Assay", assay$assay, "has", round(assay$zero_percent, 2), "% zero values (acceptable)\n")
    }
  }
  
  # Check 7: ExpressionSet structure
  cat("\n  Checking ExpressionSet structure...\n")
  if (validObject(eset)) {
    cat("    ✓ ExpressionSet is a valid object\n")
  } else {
    cat("    WARNING: ExpressionSet is not a valid object\n")
    all_passed <- FALSE
  }
  
  if (all_passed) {
    cat("\n✓ All quality checks passed!\n")
  } else {
    cat("\n⚠ Some quality checks failed. Review warnings above.\n")
  }
  
  return(all_passed)
}

# Main execution
main <- function() {
  cat("========================================\n")
  cat("Building ExpressionSet with Biobase\n")
  cat("========================================\n")
  
  tryCatch({
    # Step 1: Read input files
    data <- read_input_files()
    
    # Step 2: Align samples
    aligned_data <- align_samples(data$counts, data$clinical)
    
    # Step 3: Create ExpressionSet
    eset <- create_expression_set(aligned_data$counts, aligned_data$clinical)
    
    # Step 4: Save ExpressionSet as RDS
    rds_path <- "outputs/multi_assay_eset.rds"
    cat("\nSaving ExpressionSet to:", rds_path, "\n")
    saveRDS(eset, file = rds_path)
    cat("  ✓ ExpressionSet saved successfully\n")
    
    # Step 5: Compute and save assay summary statistics
    assay_summary <- compute_assay_summary(eset)
    csv_path <- "outputs/assay_summary.csv"
    cat("\nSaving assay summary to:", csv_path, "\n")
    write.csv(assay_summary, file = csv_path, row.names = FALSE)
    cat("  ✓ Assay summary saved successfully\n")
    
    # Step 6: Perform quality checks
    cat("\n========================================\n")
    cat("Quality Checks\n")
    cat("========================================\n")
    qc_passed <- perform_quality_checks(eset, assay_summary)
    
    # Final summary
    cat("\n========================================\n")
    cat("Final Summary\n")
    cat("========================================\n")
    cat("ExpressionSet object created with:\n")
    cat("  -", nrow(eset), "features (genes)\n")
    cat("  -", ncol(eset), "samples\n")
    cat("  -", length(names(assayData(eset))), "assays:", paste(names(assayData(eset)), collapse = ", "), "\n")
    cat("  -", ncol(pData(eset)), "clinical variables\n")
    
    if (qc_passed) {
      cat("\n✓ Script completed successfully!\n")
    } else {
      cat("\n⚠ Script completed with warnings.\n")
    }
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("\n❌ Error occurred:\n")
    cat("  ", e$message, "\n")
    stop("Script execution failed", call. = FALSE)
  })
}

# Run main function
main()
```
